nodes.name: Schedule: Täglich 07:00 (Mo-Fr)
nodes.notes: Läuft werktags morgens. Cron anpassbar im Parameter rule.interval.

assignments.name: senderCompany
assignments.value: {{INDIVIDUELL: Dein Unternehmen, z.B. Schmidt SaaS GmbH}}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id            AS customer_id,
  c.name          AS customer_name,
  c.email         AS customer_email,
  c.plan          AS plan,
  c.mrr           AS mrr,
  c.signup_date   AS signup_date,
  MAX(a.last_login_at)                                  AS last_login_at,
  COALESCE(SUM(a.sessions_last_30d), 0)                 AS sessions_30d,
  COALESCE(SUM(a.sessions_prev_30d), 0)                 AS sessions_prev_30d,
  COALESCE(MAX(a.open_support_tickets), 0)              AS open_tickets,
  COALESCE(MAX(a.failed_payments_90d), 0)               AS failed_payments,
  COALESCE(MAX(a.feature_adoption_pct), 0)              AS feature_adoption_pct
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN customer_activity a ON a.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'active'
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.email, c.plan, c.mrr, c.signup_date;

nodes.name: Postgres: Kunden-Aktivität laden
nodes.notes: Passe Tabellen/Spalten an dein Schema an. Alternative: HTTP-Request gegen deine Product-Analytics-API (Mixpanel/PostHog/Stripe).

nodes.name: HTTP: KI-Churn-Analyse
nodes.notes: Token NUR im Credential-Store. Spending-Cap bei OpenRouter setzen.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.ai_email_subject }}
parameters.html:
=

Hallo {{ $json.customer_name }},

{{ $json.ai_email_body }}

Viele Grüße,
{{ $('Set: Churn-Konfiguration').first().json.senderName }}
{{ $('Set: Churn-Konfiguration').first().json.senderCompany }}

Du erhältst diese Nachricht als aktiver Kunde von {{ $('Set: Churn-Konfiguration').first().json.productName }}. Benachrichtigungen verwalten

nodes.name: Email: Retention-Sequenz
nodes.notes: Sendet automatische Retention-Mail. Bei MRR über X EUR ggf. NUR Alert (kein Auto-Mail) — siehe README.

nodes.name: Postgres: Churn-Event protokollieren
nodes.notes: Audit-Trail. Verhindert Doppel-Alerts pro Tag via ON CONFLICT.

parameters.subject: =[Churn-Radar] Workflow-Fehler in Schritt: {{ $json.error?.node?.name || 'unbekannt' }}

parameters.content:
## Churn-Radar
Täglicher Scan der Kunden-Aktivität → Churn-Score → bei Über-Schwelle: KI-Analyse + automatische Retention-Mail + CS-Team-Alert + Audit-Log.

**Vor Aktivierung:** alle {{INDIVIDUELL: ...}}-Platzhalter im Set-Node + Credentials setzen.
